fixed_source: m=passwordstrength;i=io:std.io;i=s:std.str;f=haslower(p:$str):$bool{let n=s.len(p);let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let ch=s.slice(p;i;i+1);if(s.contains("abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz";ch)){found=true}};<found};f=hasupper(p:$str):$bool{let n=s.len(p);let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let ch=s.slice(p;i;i+1);if(s.contains("ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ";ch)){found=true}};<found};f=hasdigit(p:$str):$bool{let n=s.len(p);let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let ch=s.slice(p;i;i+1);if(s.contains("0123456789";ch)){found=true}};<found};f=hassym(p:$str):$bool{let n=s.len(p);let found=mut.false;lp(let i=0;i<n;i=i+1){let ch=s.slice(p;i;i+1);if(s.contains("!@#$%^&*()-_+=.,;:?/";ch)){found=true}};<found};f=main():$i64{let line=s.trim(io.readln());let length=s.len(line);let score=mut.0;if(length>=8){score=score+1};if(length>=16){score=score+1};if(haslower(line)){score=score+1};if(hasupper(line)){score=score+1};if(hasdigit(line)){score=score+1};if(hassym(line)){score=score+1};if(score>=6){io.println("very_strong")}el{if(score>=4){io.println("strong")}el{io.println("weak")}};<0}
